versions.version_description: Two voicings defined: (i) easy-to-play open chords and (ii) barre chords that match the original voicing.
This version features the solo at the beginning and the end of the song. Credits to pmalavi for making the one that I based this on.

This is my first tab, so I hope it works for you guys. I'm an alto, so I made this for people who are more comfortable singing in a lower range as opposed soprano. The chords are simplified for beginners, no capo is needed. I switched off an "Em" for an "E" at the end of the last chorus before the bridge, to add a different feel. That's just my interpretation of the song, so please do what you like with that part. :).

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]Am[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Fmaj7[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]


[Chorus]
[tab]                    [ch]Am[/ch]
I love it when you call me señorita[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]                   [ch]Am[/ch]
